name: Tim Allen
blurb: His 1990 Showtime special Men Are Pigs grew out of that act.
bio: Tim Allen is an American comedian and actor who developed a stand-up act centered on masculinity, tools, and family before rising to fame as Tim Taylor on the ABC sitcom Home Improvement (1991-1999). His 1990 Showtime special Men Are Pigs grew out of that act. He later headlined the film franchises The Santa Clause and Toy Story (as the voice of Buzz Lightyear).

timeline.ev: First stand-up set at Mark Ridleys Comedy Castle, Detroit area
Home Improvement premieres; Tonight Show appearance
Tops box office, bestseller list, and TV ratings in one week

accolades: Simultaneously held number-one film, book, and TV show in November 1994

bits.t: First Appearance on Carson Tonight Show
